title: Oil prices fall ~4% on ceasefire assurance — Brent $109.87, WTI $102.27, retreat from 4-year highs
snippet: Brent crude futures fell about 4% to close at $109.87/bbl. WTI lost nearly 4% to settle at $102.27/bbl. Decline followed Hegseth's statement that US-Iran ceasefire remains in place, easing fears of return to full-scale war. Previous session (May 4): Brent rose 6% to $114.44 (4-year high), WTI rose 4% to $106.42. Since war began (Feb 28), both contracts up about 60%.
tag_reason: 5/5 유가 ~4% 급락은 5/4 급등의 반전이며, 헤그세스 발언이 유가 안정 변수로 작동한 새로운 시장 동향
